_fixture_note: INSIDE the 14-day hard floor. This is the higher-ranked candidate the media stage SKIPPED for cooldown (see media-decision.json skipped_candidates / risk_codes PKG.MEDIA_COOLDOWN_BLOCKED).

OUTSIDE the 14-day hard floor (and the 30-day target window). This is the asset the media stage CHOSE to reuse (see media-decision.json chosen_asset_id) — cooldown clears, so validate-package emits no PKG.MEDIA_COOLDOWN_BLOCKED for the published item.
